criterion: site is outside credible floodplain and surface-water flow path
minimum_expectation: document flood history and local drainage
preferred_expectation: independent flood study with freeboard and drainage design

criterion: seismic hazard identified and structural engineer engaged
minimum_expectation: local seismic classification and structural design basis
red_flag: no seismic review where hazard exists

criterion: bearing capacity groundwater and soil risks reviewed
preferred_expectation: boreholes lab tests and foundation recommendation
red_flag: no geotechnical evidence before design freeze

criterion: grid capacity and power-quality constraints known
preferred_expectation: firm capacity offer with upgrade path and outage data

criterion: two independent fibre path options identified
preferred_expectation: diverse entry routes and meet-me plan
documented crane fuel and emergency access plan
red_flag: no all-weather access for fuel or emergency response

minimum_expectation: planning fire environmental and utility contacts listed

criterion: defensible perimeter and access control possible
preferred_expectation: layered security layout with expansion corridor

criterion: water stress dust heat humidity and corrosion risks known
preferred_expectation: cooling strategy matched to climate and water limits
red_flag: cooling concept depends on scarce water

criterion: expansion corridor and future utility route preserved
red_flag: no room for growth beyond pilot
